description: DPS quota-aware local volume driver with snapshots and S3-compatible backup

env.name: DPS_ROOT
env.description: DPS metadata, snapshots, pool image, and fixed volume images

env.name: DPS_MOUNT_ROOT
env.description: Docker propagated mount root; keep under /mnt/dps for managed plugins

env.name: DPS_POOL_MODE
env.description: Pool mode: auto, loop, direct, or none

env.name: DPS_POOL_IMAGE
env.description: Loopback pool image path; defaults to <root>/pool.img

env.name: DPS_DEFAULT_VOLUME_SIZE
env.description: Default per-volume size when driver_opts.size is omitted

env.name: DPS_DEFAULT_VOLUME_INODES
env.description: Default per-volume inode limit when driver_opts.inodes is omitted

env.name: DPS_REQUIRE_LIMITS
env.description: Reject volume creation unless size is provided by driver_opts or DPS_DEFAULT_VOLUME_SIZE

env.name: DPS_ALLOW_MOUNTED_ARCHIVES
env.description: Deprecated compatibility flag: maps empty DPS_ARCHIVE_POLICY to crash-consistent

env.name: DPS_ARCHIVE_POLICY
env.description: Archive consistency policy: offline, crash-consistent, or hooked

env.name: DPS_PRE_ARCHIVE_HOOK
env.description: Shell command run before snapshot or backup-volume when DPS_ARCHIVE_POLICY=hooked

env.name: DPS_POST_ARCHIVE_HOOK
env.description: Shell command run after snapshot or backup-volume when DPS_ARCHIVE_POLICY=hooked
